{"id":"smallhold-m2o7","title":"Delivery worker: tokio task, HTTP sig, exponential backoff, dead-letter","description":"In-process tokio task that polls delivery_queue every N seconds (default 5s, configurable). Fetches up to batch_size rows where next_attempt_at <= now AND delivered_at IS NULL AND dead_at IS NULL. For each: sign the activity with the sender's private key (POST signature: (request-target), host, date, digest), POST to target_inbox, handle result:
- 2xx → set delivered_at=now
- 410 Gone → set dead_at=now immediately
- 4xx (non-410) → set dead_at after 1 retry
- 5xx or network error → schedule retry per backoff: 1m, 5m, 30m, 2h, 8h, 24h (max 6 attempts, then dead_at)

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to study how activitypub-federation handles delivery signatures. Spawn a parallel subagent to implement the circuit breaker. Spawn a testing subagent to write delivery tests with a mock HTTP server.

Test discipline:
- Test with mock server returning 200 → delivered_at set, attempts=1
- Test with mock server returning 500 twice then 200 → retries, then delivered
- Test with mock server returning 410 → dead_at set immediately, no retry
- Test retry schedule: after first failure, next_attempt_at is approx 1min in future
- Test max retries: 7 failures → dead_at set on 7th
- HTTP signature on POST: verify using a mock server that checks the signature format

Defensive programming:
- Panic in the delivery task must not crash the server — wrap worker loop in catch_unwind or restart on panic
- Deliver concurrently up to delivery_concurrency limit (semaphore)
- Never log the activity body at INFO level — log only target inbox + activity type","acceptance_criteria":"2xx → delivered; 410 → immediately dead; 5xx → retries on schedule; after 6 retries → dead_at; HTTP signature present; worker panic doesn't crash server","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:35:59Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:35:59Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-70g","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:36:04Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
